title: 耳のお手入れは丁寧に

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Grass, about this afternoon...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, there you are, King! This way, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Urara.
Is this the famed ear-cleaning maestro?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Ear-cleaning maestro?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yup! King is super awesome at making your ears
nice and clean!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
She always gives my ears a good brushy brush. I
feel all wobbly when she's done, like jello!

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa!
Could you do that for us too?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I-I mean... all I'm doing is basic upkeep and care!
Isn't that right, Grass?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hm? Why are you asking for my opinion?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Because I'm talking about normal ear cleaning
routines here. After a light brushing...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I lightly pat everything down with a
well-squeezed moist towel. I make sure to use
warm water for the towel since Urara becomes
jumpy if it's cold.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Then I dry off the last of the water with a soft, dry
towel. That's when I use the professional cotton
swab made just for ears...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh my. How thorough.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Thorough?! This is normal! Urara is always skipping steps so I have to spend extra time teaching her the right way.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The ears are a very important organ. They process
our auditory senses, but also help us keep
balance. Proper ear care is the first step to
winning.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're very much in your element, King.
However...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass! You know where my ear pick is?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, did you lose it again? How many does that
make now?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hm... I'm not sure?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I think I normally lose one a month! C'mon, Grass,
lemme borrow yours!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Eek! U-uh, you know I was just kidding, right?
Hehe... I'll just find a twig somewhere and make
do...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No, El! Why would you resort to that?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
How can you be so reckless? Although... I
suppose I've seen stranger.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, didn't see you there, King! And what's
everyone else doing here... Are you settin' up
wrestling brackets?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Nope, nope. Everyone's here to get their ears
cleaned by King!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Why don't you line up too? Apparently,
the sensation is enough to send you to heaven.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: For real?! King, would you clean my ears too?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now you, El?! Honestly...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'll go get my tools! You all stay put!

text_block_list.name: All
text_block_list.text: Kaaay!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Experience is the best teacher, they say.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps, if El gets a taste of luxury, her standards
toward self-care will change for the better.
